sources.title: Constant power discharge test
sources.handbook_title: Test methods for improved battery cell understanding
sources.citation_ieee: [M7] G. Mulder, H. Popp, W. Kohs, K. Trad, K. de Craemer, W. Porcher, M. Montaru, M. A. Martinez, A. Marongiu, M. Oyarbide et al., "Test methods for improved battery cell understanding: Constant power discharge test," White Paper, 2018, pp. 25-27.
sources.linked_reference_markdown: [M7] G. Mulder, H. Popp, W. Kohs, K. Trad, K. de Craemer, W. Porcher, M. Montaru, M. A. Martinez, A. Marongiu, M. Oyarbide et al., "Test methods for improved battery cell understanding: Constant power discharge test," White Paper, 2018, pp. 25-27.
ingestion_notes: Treat this chapter as the executable reference for constant-power energy characterization.
Matrix narrowing is allowed only after the standard precharge and three-repeat structure remain explicit.

sources.title: Dynamic stress test
sources.handbook_title: Test methods for improved battery cell understanding
sources.citation_ieee: [M8] G. Mulder, H. Popp, W. Kohs, K. Trad, K. de Craemer, W. Porcher, M. Montaru, M. A. Martinez, A. Marongiu, M. Oyarbide et al., "Test methods for improved battery cell understanding: Dynamic stress test," White Paper, 2018, pp. 28-30.
sources.linked_reference_markdown: [M8] G. Mulder, H. Popp, W. Kohs, K. Trad, K. de Craemer, W. Porcher, M. Montaru, M. A. Martinez, A. Marongiu, M. Oyarbide et al., "Test methods for improved battery cell understanding: Dynamic stress test," White Paper, 2018, pp. 28-30.
ingestion_notes: Treat the chapter as the core reference for DST profile execution, not for inventing alternative automotive profiles.
Scaling-basis choice remains review-controlled, but the 360 s continuous profile logic should stay fixed.

sources.title: Drive cycle
sources.handbook_title: Test methods for improved battery cell understanding
sources.citation_ieee: [M9] G. Mulder, H. Popp, W. Kohs, K. Trad, K. de Craemer, W. Porcher, M. Montaru, M. A. Martinez, A. Marongiu, M. Oyarbide et al., "Test methods for improved battery cell understanding: Drive cycle," White Paper, 2018, pp. 49-50.
sources.linked_reference_markdown: [M9] G. Mulder, H. Popp, W. Kohs, K. Trad, K. de Craemer, W. Porcher, M. Montaru, M. A. Martinez, A. Marongiu, M. Oyarbide et al., "Test methods for improved battery cell understanding: Drive cycle," White Paper, 2018, pp. 49-50.
ingestion_notes: Treat this chapter as the usage-profile execution reference for drive-cycle testing.
Keep the charge-pause-profile-repeat loop visible even when the drive cycle family is tailored.
